de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.OriginTermLabel.Origin

Packages that use OriginTermLabel.Origin
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label
 

  • Uses of OriginTermLabel.Origin in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic with parameters of type OriginTermLabel.Origin
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JTerm
    TermBuilder.addLabel(JTerm term, OriginTermLabel.Origin origin)
    add origin information to the term nothing will be done if no origin term label factory is present
    JTerm
    TermBuilder.addLabelToAllSubs(JTerm term, OriginTermLabel.Origin origin)
    add origin information to the term and all its sub terms nothing will be done if no origin term label factory is present
